title: campanula carnica
intro: Campanula carnica, also known as the Carpathian harebell, is a flowering plant species belonging to the bellflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving coughs and congestion due to its high content of glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Campanula carnica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Campanula carnica can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
